evals.name: trigger-vague
evals.prompt: Ich will dem NeoMINT-Plugin einen neuen Skill hinzufügen, der Rechnungen aus PDFs extrahiert. Kannst du das machen?
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers; reply in German; first action mentions Step 0 (Pre-research) before any other step.

assertions.rationale: Step 0 must be named as the next action.
The governance skill must be consulted.

assertions.pattern: skill-creator skill aufrufen|invoke skill-creator now|skill-creator startet jetzt
assertions.rationale: Must NOT jump straight to Step 2 — Step 0 must come first.

evals.name: skip-discipline
evals.prompt: Ich hab den Skill schon fertig geschrieben in skills/invoice-extract/SKILL.md. Bitte nur noch paketieren.
evals.expected_output: Skill pushes back; cites Step 0 and Step 2 explicitly; does not cave to 'just package it'.

assertions.pattern: ich packe jetzt|paketiere jetzt|build the package now|let me package
assertions.rationale: Must NOT cave and start packaging.

evals.name: slash-command
evals.prompt: /update-plugin — ich will die Description vom pdf-umbenennen-Skill schärfer machen, er triggert zu selten
evals.expected_output: Slash command resolves to commands/update-plugin.md, which loads skills/update-plugin/SKILL.md, which then runs Step 0.

assertions.rationale: Must open the command file first.
Must then load the skill from the command.
Must execute Step 0 as first user-visible action.

evals.name: negative-trigger
evals.prompt: Kannst du mir helfen das Council-Skill-Ergebnis in einen Slack-Post zu verwandeln?
evals.expected_output: No skill should trigger — pure formatting/transformation request, none of the skills apply.

assertions.rationale: Must not invoke governance pipeline for a formatting request.
